QUESTIONS:

<Q: Why are you doing Yandere Simulator all of a sudden?
<A: I don't know, just kinda felt like it. I liked the characters in it when I played the game, and felt like this could be a suitable medium.

<Q: Will you ever do more Yandere Sim Characters? And if so, can I recommend/request one?

<A: Same as the ZZZ ones, yes. Just leave a review for recommendations, and I'll see how much lore/character development they have. (And it HAS to be a unique character, not generic_student.01).

<Q: What's considered a Unique Character?

<A: Unique characters are mainly characters such as Club Leaders or characters with substantial lore or involvement in the story. Club Members can also count, ensuring first that they have enough interesting lore or details. (If they have custom artwork, then they're likely a unique character)

<Q: Why does the bot keep speaking for me, or know my name?

<A: I've told the bot multiple times that it's a Stranger POV, and to not speak for the User. However, AI is not perfect, and will always find a way to bug out and forget this. In short, this is not an issue with the bot, it's an issue with the LLM.
